message.content:
@startuml
title Remove Bag Effect

participant "Virologist" as Virologist
participant "Bag" as Bag

Virologist -> Bag: 1 removeEffect(virologist)
activate Bag
Bag -> Bag: 2 getExtraInventorSize()
activate Bag
Bag --> Bag: 3 extraInventorSize
deactivate Bag

Bag -> Virologist: 4 getInventorSize()
activate Virologist
Virologist --> Bag: 5 inventorSize
deactivate Virologist

note right of Virologist: Decreas the inventor size by the bag's extra inventor size
end note

Virologist -> Bag: 6 setInventorySize(inventorSize - extraInventorSize)
activate Virologist
Virologist --> Bag: 7
deactivate Virologist

Bag --> Virologist: 8
deactivate Bag

@enduml
